# Aira — Set 8 · 20 NEW Reel Concepts (131–150) · Out-of-This-World Edition · Sys Directive 3 v3.16-VP

<aside>
🌌

Set 8 — The Out-of-This-World Edition (Full-Depth Build). Twenty all-new Aira reel concepts (131–150), every world cosmic, celestial, or impossibly surreal — and every world distinct from Sets 1–7, the IRL episodes, and every transformation run. Each concept carries one signature micro-magic mechanic (the single impossible move), a randomized 6–8 frame count, and a fixed talkable / non-talkable mode. Every frame is written at full production depth in the locked house format — Identity Lock, Scene Note, Visual-Lead Note, Wardrobe, Footwear, Accessories, Hair, Makeup, Eye Colour, Hands, Facial Micro-Dynamics, Posture, 8-layer Kinetic Stillness, Micro-Magic, Spatial Logic, Lighting, Framing, Lens/DOF, Composition Reference, Atmosphere, Color Grade, Texture & Micro-Detail, Story Beat, Negative — and every video prompt adds fine-beat VEO timestamps, a PHYSICS section, a MICRO-MAGIC section, itemized AUDIO, a FACIAL CONSISTENCY / IDENTITY LOCK block, and lip-sync status.

</aside>

## How to read this document

Each concept opens with a locked spec block, then runs frame-by-frame. Every frame has a full IMAGE PROMPT for Nano Banana Pro and a full VIDEO PROMPT for VEO 3.1. The image prompt resolves identity, the scene, the visual lead, wardrobe, hair, makeup, the concept-locked footwear, the concept-locked accessories, the eye-colour treatment, hands, facial micro-dynamics, posture, an 8-layer living-stillness stack, the single micro-magic beat, spatial logic, lighting, framing, lens, atmosphere, grade, texture, the story beat, and a negative list. The video prompt gives shot type, camera move, lens, beat-by-beat action on fine VEO timestamps, the physics of how the magic resolves, the micro-magic beat, continuity guarantees, lighting, environment, a full diegetic audio bed, any spoken line, duration, frame-rate/motion-blur, lip-sync state, a facial-consistency / identity lock block, and a negative list.

## Set-wide locks (apply to every frame of every concept)

Identity. AIRA renders from the locked reference sheet only — (PLACEHOLDER: paste current Aira reference sheet / face-lock image here). Lock face, bone structure, hairline, skin texture, and iris pattern to the reference; zero drift between frames; a consistent adult woman, non-sexualized at all times. — no physical-trait enumeration: never spell out age, ethnicity, skin, hair, eye, or face-shape attributes in prompt text; identity is carried entirely by the reference sheet.

Format. Every image and video is vertical 9:16. Keep the top 12% and bottom 25% clear of critical action for platform-UI safety.

Footwear / Accessories / Eye-Colour rule. Each concept locks one footwear piece, one accessory pair, and one eye-colour treatment. These are described identically in every frame of that concept and vary only between concepts. For eye colour the iris itself always stays exactly as the reference defines it — only the catchlight signature (the reflected light on the eye) changes per concept; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

Micro-magic. One impossible move per concept, established within the first ≈1.2 seconds of any video frame, with locked START/END transform keyframes so the magic interpolates cleanly and identity never drifts beneath it.

Tooling. Image — Nano Banana Pro. Video — VEO 3.1. 24fps, 180° shutter unless noted; per-frame diegetic audio plus a low master track that never goes full.

# CONCEPT 131 — NEBULA GLASSBLOWER'S VOID

Title: Pillar 1 — Cinematic Story (zero-gravity glass studio adrift in a nebula)

Format: Micro-magic narrative hero / cosmic glassblowing editorial (talkable)

Hero Prop: a long glassblower's blowpipe ending in a cold, dark gather of star-glass — the focal object into which she breathes a living miniature nebula

Setting: a glass-walled observatory studio adrift in deep space, a vast panoramic window holding a slow-churning violet-and-teal nebula, a contained star-ember glowing cold-orange in a shielded furnace off right, fine glass dust and a few stray sparks drifting weightless through the still air

Wardrobe: a heat-tailored charcoal apron-coat in heavy matte canvas worn over a high-neck slate thermal knit, a single supple leather gauntlet on the working hand, the coat holding sculptural folds, fully modest. Believability/realism layer (section K): every element is real and clearly described; the one magical beat is surreal yet grounded in real physics and premium execution — no cheap sparkles, no floaty/plasticky CGI; scale and 3D placement stay believable; her single self, face and wardrobe stay continuity-locked; frame joins are hard match-cuts to new angles.

Hair: a low braided coil pinned close at the nape with a few face-framing strands, deep natural sheen, color locked to reference

Makeup: ember-lit clean glow — soft satin skin, a warm bronze-smoked lower lid, a muted terracotta-rose lip with a soft sheen, a fine highlight on the high points, brushed-up brows, real pores

Movement (one impossible move): she exhales down the blowpipe and a living miniature nebula condenses, ignites, and slowly swirls inside the hand-blown glass orb at its tip — a galaxy caught in glass (locked transform keyframes)

Concept Line: "I keep a little galaxy where my breath used to be."

Duration: ≈35 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: AWED, ORACULAR, COSMIC-INTIMATE

Composition: centered figure against the deep nebula window with the glowing orb as a second light source

Grade: deep-space violet-teal against warm ember-orange highlights — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, cinematic contrast, no murk

Spoken line (talkable): lands Frame 4 — "Every breath I take, something is born." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (low studio hum, furnace breath, glass chime, weightless spark-crackle) plus a separate low master track — ambient cosmic cinematic, kept under the line, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; wardrobe fully modest; mood awed and cosmic, never sexualized. respected — no physical-trait enumeration.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED FOOTWEAR: magnetic-soled charcoal work boots with a softly squared toe, a low architectural sole, and a brushed-brass star-map plate inlaid across the heel face, faint matte-leather sheen, slate topstitching along the seam — identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED ACCESSORIES: a slim brushed-brass orbit-ring bangle on the gauntlet wrist (a thin second ring spinning slow around it) + a single meteorite-glass stud earring on the left ear (faint internal sparkle) — no other jewelry, identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as reference; locked catchlight signature is a paired reflection — a warm ember-gold glow low in the eye and a cool nebula-violet pinpoint high in the eye (the furnace ember vs the nebula window) — identical in every frame; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

---

MASTER AUDIO: a 42-second custom cinematic score (7 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on a glassy harp, an airy choir pad and soft weightless textures — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a shimmering harp sweep over a choir-pad bloom (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — she exhales down the blowpipe and a living miniature nebula condenses, ignites, and slowly swirls inside…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, weightless choir shimmer as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

## Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

SCENE NOTE: the hush before the breath. Aira stands at her bench in a glass-walled studio adrift in deep space, the cold dark gather of star-glass resting on the blowpipe before her, the great nebula turning slow beyond the window. She is calm, gathered, about to begin — the establishing beat before any magic, the loneliness and grandeur of working alone among the stars sitting quietly in her face.

VISUAL-LEAD NOTE: catch the cosmic-calm establishing beat — lone figure at a glass bench, the dark gather waiting on the pipe, the violet-teal nebula filling the window behind her, ember-orange furnace-glow warming one side of her face.

WARDROBE: the charcoal matte-canvas apron-coat worn over the high-neck slate thermal knit, the leather gauntlet on the working hand, the canvas holding clean sculptural folds with one warm ember sheen along the shoulder and a cool violet rim down the other arm, fully modest, pristine, zero lint or snags.

FOOTWEAR: the concept-locked magnetic-soled charcoal boots with the squared toe and the brushed-brass star-map heel plate, the matte leather picking up a warm ember thread on one boot and a cool violet thread on the other, slate topstitching crisp.

ACCESSORIES: the slim brushed-brass orbit-ring bangle on the gauntlet wrist with its thin second ring spinning slow, and the single meteorite-glass stud earring on the left ear catching a tiny internal sparkle, no other jewelry.

HAIR: the low braided coil pinned close at the nape with a few face-framing strands loose at the temple, deep natural sheen, razor-clean hairline, individual strands reading real, color locked to reference.

MAKEUP: ember-lit clean glow — satin skin, a warm bronze-smoked lower lid, muted terracotta-rose lip with a soft sheen, fine highlight on cheekbone and nose-tip, brushed-up brows, dewy real skin with visible pores and fine vellus texture.

EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as referenced; the locked dual catchlight present — a warm ember-gold glow low in the eye, a cool nebula-violet pinpoint high in the eye — a crisp readable twin reflection; the eyes never glitch.

HANDS & NAILS: the gauntleted working hand resting light on the blowpipe near the gather, fingers relaxed with no grip-tension; the bare hand easy on the bench edge, fingers gently curved; short almond nails in a soft neutral gloss, natural nail-beds, neat cuticles, no fused or extra fingers.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: a calm gathered quarter-attention, brows level, lips softly closed on a slow held breath before she begins, eyes steady on the dark gather, the faintest reverent stillness at the outer eye.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: three-quarter to camera at the bench, weight settled into the back hip with a 2° counter-tilt, front shoulder dropped a touch over the pipe, chin level, spine long and grounded, alive and breathing (living stillness).

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) a single loose strand drifting slow at the temple in the still air; (2) the great nebula churning almost imperceptibly beyond the glass; (3) the furnace ember pulsing with a barely-visible breath of light; (4) a few stray sparks drifting weightless across the lower frame; (5) chest rising on a soft shallow inhale; (6) a thin warm highlight sliding along the blowpipe steel; (7) the canvas coat breathing with a micro-shift of fold-shadow as her ribcage expands; (8) a slow eyelash settle completing a quiet blink.

MICRO-MAGIC (cue only): deep inside the dark gather of glass, the faintest single mote of violet light has just begun to spiral — no brighter than a trapped spark, deniable, the first whisper of the nebula to come.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the blowpipe gather and her gauntleted hand at ≈20% depth, tack sharp. MIDGROUND — Aira three-quarter at the bench. BACKGROUND — the panoramic nebula window in deep violet-teal, the shielded furnace ember off right for a warm accent, no clutter.

LIGHTING: KEY — the cool nebula window as a soft wrapping key from frame-left. FILL — a gentle violet bounce lifting the under-chin just clean. RIM — the warm furnace ember skimming her right cheek and the coil of hair. PRACTICAL — the nebula glow and the furnace ember. SEPARATION — the studio pulled deep so she reads ≈2 stops up. BOUNCE — a faint warm kick off the blowpipe steel.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; medium, chest-up to mid-thigh, 12% headroom, the blowpipe gather entering the lower third, clean deep negative space camera-left to receive the orb-glow that arrives later.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A medium framing holds Aira at about 12% headroom, chest-up to mid-thigh, the blowpipe gather entering the lower third, clean deep negative space camera-left to receive the orb-glow that arrives later. She is three-quarter to camera at the bench, weight settled into the back hip with a 2° counter-tilt, front shoulder dropped a touch over the pipe, chin level, spine long and grounded, alive and breathing. The camera holds a mid distance, Aira the sharp central figure of the Nebula Glassblower's Void scene, with the clean negative space opening camera-left. She faces front to the lens. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm, f/2.2; focus split between her near eye and the dark gather so both read crisp; the studio melting to soft violet-teal bokeh; stray sparks rendering as soft floating points; gentle highlight roll-off, no clipping.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: cosmic cinematic establishing hero — lone figure, dark gather, the nebula vast behind, one impossible cue building (BA.3 cause building to effect).

ATMOSPHERE: hushed, vast, reverent — the lonely grandeur of working alone among the stars.

COLOR GRADE: deep-space violet-teal against warm ember-orange highlights — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, cinematic contrast, no murk.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the dark star-glass gather reads dense and glossy with a faint internal depth; the blowpipe steel scuffed and real; the boot's brass star-map plate catching a crisp glint; real skin micro-texture with soft peach-fuzz catching the ember rim at the jaw; sparks drifting weightless through the cool key.

STORY BEAT: the gathered hush before creation — she stands ready at her bench among the stars, the dark glass waiting, her breath held, the single violet mote stirring deep in the gather. The quiet before something is born.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mismatched footwear, mannequin posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, glitching or colour-shifting eyes, crushed muddy blacks, garish oversaturation, flat dull light.

## Frame 1 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY (locked): Aira — same person every frame; face, bone structure, eye shape + colour, nose, lips, skin texture and hair strictly locked to reference; ONLY expression, gaze and head move; no identity drift, no face/anatomy warp, no second or duplicate person.

SHOT TYPE: medium, chest-up to mid-thigh, subject fills ≈52% of the vertical frame.

LENS: 35mm, f/2.2, smooth violet-teal background fall-off.

SHOT BREAKDOWN (timed, 6s · real-time, continuous energetic motion — never slow-motion, never a static hold; expression eye-led and identity-safe):
- [00:00–00:02] medium, chest-up to mid-thigh, subject fills ≈52% of the vertical frame: a single slow 8% push-in across the clip is already underway — hold the still tableau, the furnace ember pulsing once, the dark gather reading instantly on the pipe.
- [00:02–00:04] the single violet mote spirals faintly inside the gather, catching the eye; Aira's chest rises on a slow gathering breath, shoulders settling lower over the pipe.
- [00:04–00:06] her eyes steady on the gather, the brass orbit-ring spinning a slow half-turn on her wrist; she lifts the mouthpiece toward her lips, the clip holding on the dark gather just before the breath.

PHYSICS: the studio air is still and weightless — stray sparks and glass dust drift on near-zero-G with slow buoyant arcs; her body, hair, coat, and the heavy pipe obey normal gravity, anchored by the magnetic boots; only the loose particulate floats. The trapped mote moves like a slow ember in glass, never snapping.

MICRO-MAGIC: exactly one impossible beat — the single violet mote spiraling deep in the gather; nothing else defies physics yet.

CONTINUITY: boots, orbit-ring bangle, meteorite stud, gauntlet, wardrobe, braided coil, makeup, and the dual ember-gold / nebula-violet catchlight identical to the image frame and carried forward unchanged.

AUDIO: diegetic only. Ambient — a low studio hum and a faint furnace breath throughout, the deep silence of space beyond the glass. SFX — a soft furnace whoomph at 0:00.6 (warm attack, long tail), a faint glassy shimmer from the gather at 0:01.6, a delicate weightless spark-crackle at 0:02.4. Reaction — a soft audible breath at 0:03.0. Master — a low ambient cosmic pad just kindling under the room tone (present, never full). VO — none this frame.

DURATION: 6 seconds (the clip plays the full 6s at real-time natural speed).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, real-time playback at natural speed (no slow-motion), 180° shutter, natural motion blur.

LIP-SYNC: none this frame — lips closed / softly parted on the gathering breath, no spoken words.

FACIAL CONSISTENCY / IDENTITY LOCK: hold the Aira reference exactly across all frames — face, bone structure, hairline, hair color and base texture locked; eyes carry only the locked ember-gold low / nebula-violet high catchlight, iris unchanged, no heterochromia, zero drift, the eyes never glitch; keyframe-lock the identity so the mixed warm-cool key never melts or shifts the features.

NEGATIVE: identity drift, face or hand warp, extra or fused fingers, duplicate person, mirrored/flipped frame, slow-motion, watermark.

## Frame 2 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here]. TRANSFORM KEYFRAME NOTE: continuity-locked START of the nebula-breath — face fully recognizable, the mouthpiece at her lips, the gather just beginning to swell into a clear orb as the first violet-teal swirl ignites inside it. Lock this START so Frame 3 interpolates cleanly to the fully-formed nebula-orb.

SCENE NOTE: the breath begins. Aira blows a slow, controlled breath down the blowpipe and the dark gather swells into a glowing glass orb; deep inside it, a miniature nebula ignites and begins to swirl — her exhale becoming a galaxy. Her eyes are lit from within by the new violet glow, wonder and concentration held together.

VISUAL-LEAD NOTE: catch the ignition beat — the orb forming at the pipe's tip, the first violet-teal swirl blooming inside it, her cheeks softly engaged in the breath, her face under-lit by the kindling galaxy.

WARDROBE: the charcoal apron-coat, continuity-locked, the front now catching cool violet orb-glow along the lapel over the warm furnace rim, fully modest, pristine.

FOOTWEAR: the concept-locked magnetic-soled charcoal boots, the brushed-brass star-map heel plate now sparking faintly with the orb's violet glow, slate topstitching crisp, planted firm.

ACCESSORIES: the brushed-brass orbit-ring bangle (its second ring spinning a touch faster as if stirred) and the meteorite-glass stud earring, unchanged, the stud's internal sparkle answering the orb.

HAIR: the low braided coil, continuity-locked, a face-framing strand drifting at the temple, deep sheen, color locked.

MAKEUP: the ember-lit clean glow, continuity-locked, the lower-lid bronze catching faint violet now, soft terracotta-rose lip, real pores.

EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as referenced; the locked dual catchlight — ember-gold low, nebula-violet high — intensified slightly by the kindling orb; the eyes never glitch.

HANDS & NAILS: the gauntleted hand steady on the pipe, slowly rotating it so the orb spins evenly; the bare hand cupped beneath the forming orb, not touching it; short almond neutral-gloss nails, neat cuticles, no white-knuckle tension.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: concentration warmed by wonder, cheeks softly engaged in the breath, brows lifting barely 1mm, eyes rising to the kindling orb, a held delighted stillness.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: upper body angled over the pipe, torso rotated ≈4°, chin dipped toward the orb, weight rolling soft with a 2° hip counter-tilt, feet planted, spine long.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) the new violet-teal swirl turning slow inside the orb; (2) the orb's surface settling into a clean glass sphere as it swells; (3) a temple strand drifting; (4) sparks drifting in the air; (5) chest easing out on the controlled breath; (6) violet specular sliding on the boot heel-plate; (7) the canvas coat breathing with a fold-shadow micro-shift; (8) a slow eyelash settle as she watches the orb.

MICRO-MAGIC (START keyframe): the exhaled breath ignites a living miniature nebula inside the swelling glass orb — a coil of violet-and-teal cloud-light with a few pinprick stars beginning to wheel, clearly born from her breath.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the forming orb and her cupped hand at ≈18% depth, tack sharp. MIDGROUND — Aira's face and the pipe. BACKGROUND — the nebula window in soft violet defocus echoing the orb, furnace ember off right, no clutter.

LIGHTING: KEY — cool nebula window key. FILL — soft violet bounce. RIM — warm ember on cheek and coil. PRACTICAL — the orb-glow now a soft secondary source under her chin. SEPARATION — studio deep, ≈2 stops up. BOUNCE — warm kick on the steel.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; medium close, mid-thigh up, 11% headroom, the glowing orb entering frame at the pipe's tip, cool negative space camera-left.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A medium close framing holds Aira at about 11% headroom, mid-thigh up, the glowing orb entering frame at the pipe's tip, cool negative space camera-left. She is upper body angled over the pipe, torso rotated ≈4°, chin dipped toward the orb, weight rolling soft with a 2° hip counter-tilt, feet planted, spine long. The camera holds an intimate distance, Aira the sharp central figure of the Nebula Glassblower's Void scene, with the clean negative space opening camera-left. She is turned a few degrees into the moment. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 50mm, f/2.0; focus split between her near eye and the glowing orb so both read crisp; studio melting to creamy violet; soft violet blooms around the orb; gentle roll-off.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: the ignition beat — the nebula-breath catching, galaxy legible inside glass (AT.5 transform logic).

ATMOSPHERE: hushed, charged, wondrous — the instant a breath becomes a galaxy.

COLOR GRADE: deep-space violet-teal with warm ember highlights, rich blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, no murk.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the orb reads as true molten-to-cooling glass with a clean meniscus and real internal depth; the nebula inside renders as soft volumetric cloud-light, not flat; skin micro-texture with peach-fuzz at the jaw catching warm rim; the gauntlet leather grained and real.

STORY BEAT: creation ignites — her slow breath kindles a galaxy inside the glass, the violet light rising on her face, wonder and craft held in one steady exhale.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI artifacts, watermarks, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mismatched footwear, mannequin posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, glitching or colour-shifting eyes, crushed muddy blacks, garish oversaturation, flat dull light, flat sticker-like nebula.

## Frame 2 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY (locked): Aira — same person every frame; face, bone structure, eye shape + colour, nose, lips, skin texture and hair strictly locked to reference; ONLY expression, gaze and head move; no identity drift, no face/anatomy warp, no second or duplicate person.

SHOT TYPE: medium close, mid-thigh up, subject and forming orb fill ≈58% of the frame.

LENS: 50mm, f/2.0.

SHOT BREAKDOWN (timed, 6s · real-time, continuous energetic motion — never slow-motion, never a static hold; expression eye-led and identity-safe):
- [00:00–00:02] medium close, mid-thigh up, subject and forming orb fill ≈58% of the frame: a slow smooth ≈15° orbit around her right shoulder is already underway — opens mid-breath, the orb half-formed and the first violet swirl resolving so the hook lands instantly.
- [00:02–00:04] she completes the slow exhale and the orb swells to full size, the nebula igniting and beginning to wheel inside; she rotates the pipe so the orb spins evenly, the brass orbit-ring turning on her wrist.
- [00:04–00:06] her eyes lift to the orb, violet glow rising across her face, ember rim holding on the far cheek; she eases the mouthpiece from her lips, the nebula settling into a steady swirl.

PHYSICS: the orb behaves as cooling glass — it swells smoothly under breath-pressure with believable surface tension and a faint heat-shimmer, never bubbling unnaturally; the nebula inside moves as slow volumetric cloud with gentle differential rotation, bound to the glass interior; her body, hair, and the pipe stay weighted; only stray sparks float.

MICRO-MAGIC: one beat — the exhaled nebula igniting and swirling inside the forming orb.

CONTINUITY: boots, bangle, stud, gauntlet, wardrobe, coil, makeup, dual catchlight identical to Frame 1.

AUDIO: diegetic only. Ambient — studio hum and furnace breath. SFX — a soft sustained exhale-through-pipe at 0:00.4, a glassy swell-tone as the orb forms at 0:01.2, a delicate igniting shimmer as the nebula catches at 0:01.8. Reaction — a soft held breath release at 0:04.6. Master — a low cosmic pad rising a touch (present, never full). VO — none this frame.

DURATION: 6 seconds (the clip plays the full 6s at real-time natural speed).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, real-time playback at natural speed (no slow-motion), 180° shutter, natural motion blur.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips engaged on the breath, no spoken words.

FACIAL CONSISTENCY / IDENTITY LOCK: hold the Aira reference exactly; locked ember-gold / nebula-violet catchlight only, iris unchanged, zero drift, eyes never glitch; keyframe-lock identity so the rising orb-glow never melts or shifts the features.

NEGATIVE: identity drift, face or hand warp, extra or fused fingers, duplicate person, mirrored/flipped frame, slow-motion, watermark.

## Frame 3 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here]. TRANSFORM KEYFRAME NOTE: continuity-locked resolution of the nebula-breath — the orb fully formed and the miniature galaxy swirling steadily inside it, held aloft on the pipe beside her face; identity unbroken, this is the shaping beat.

SCENE NOTE: she shapes the galaxy. The orb hangs glowing at the pipe's tip and Aira works it gently with a wooden block and a slow turn, coaxing the swirling nebula into a clean spiral; her face is calm and lit violet, the maker absorbed in her tiny universe.

VISUAL-LEAD NOTE: catch the shaping beat — the finished glowing orb beside her face, the galaxy spiraling cleanly inside, her hands working it with quiet mastery, violet glow filling her eyes.

WARDROBE: the charcoal apron-coat, continuity-locked, cool violet orb-glow meeting warm furnace rim across the centre line of her body, fully modest.

FOOTWEAR: the concept-locked magnetic boots — mostly below this crop but established and unchanged, a violet glint on the visible heel-plate.

ACCESSORIES: the brushed-brass orbit-ring bangle prominent on the working wrist catching orb-glow, and the meteorite-glass stud earring lit at the left ear.

# CONCEPT 132 — GRAVITY-WELL TEA HOUSE

Title: Pillar 2 — Surreal Product Poetry (a tea house on a slow-spinning asteroid deck)

Format: Micro-magic visual poem / orbital tea-ceremony editorial (non-talkable)

Hero Prop: a long-spouted celadon teapot and a single thin porcelain cup — the focal objects whose poured tea loops into a slow orbiting ribbon-ring around the cup instead of falling

Setting: a tiny tea house perched on a slowly spinning asteroid observation deck in orbit — a low lacquered tea table, a curved panoramic window onto a vast planet's pale ring system, warm paper-lantern light pooling on the table, fine tea-steam and a few dust-grains drifting weightless in the still air

Wardrobe: a deep-jade quilted haori-wrap in matte silk worn over a high-neck cream knit, an obi-style sash at the waist, the wrap holding soft sculptural folds, fully modest and serene. Believability/realism layer (section K): every element is real and clearly described; the one magical beat is surreal yet grounded in real physics and premium execution — no cheap sparkles, no floaty/plasticky CGI; scale and 3D placement stay believable; her single self, face and wardrobe stay continuity-locked; frame joins are hard match-cuts to new angles.

Hair: a smooth low bun with a clean centre part and a single slim lacquer hairpin, a few soft strands at the temple, deep natural sheen, color locked to reference

Makeup: warm clean glow — soft satin skin, a gentle peach wash on the lids, a glossy nude-rose lip, a fine highlight on the high points, softly brushed brows, real pores

Movement (one impossible move): the poured tea arcs from the spout and, instead of falling into the cup, loops into a slow orbiting ribbon-ring of liquid that circles the cup like a planet's ring (locked transform keyframes), while she and everything else stay fully grounded

Concept Line: none (non-talkable) — the story carried purely by the orbiting tea, the steam, light, and her serene attention

Duration: ≈30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: SERENE, MEDITATIVE, QUIETLY WONDROUS

Composition: centered low-table tea ceremony against the soft planetary-ring window, the liquid orbit-ring as the luminous focal element

Grade: warm lantern-amber against cool pearl-blue ring-light — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, gentle contrast, no murk

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (low deck hum, soft kettle-tick, porcelain chime, weightless liquid-whisper) plus a separate low master track — a meditative koto-and-pad bed, kept low, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; wardrobe fully modest; mood serene and meditative, never sexualized. respected — no physical-trait enumeration.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED FOOTWEAR: cream padded gravity-socks-boots with magnetic soles, a softly rounded toe capped in smooth jade-green resin, faint quilted texture and slim cream topstitching along the seam — identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED ACCESSORIES: a jade ring-bead bracelet on the right wrist (smooth round beads catching warm glints) + a single brass orrery-drop earring on the left ear (a tiny ringed-planet charm that swings a half-beat behind her head turns) — no other jewelry, identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as reference; locked catchlight signature is a paired reflection — a warm lantern-amber glow low in the eye and a soft pearl-blue pinpoint high in the eye (the paper lantern vs the planetary ring-light) — identical in every frame; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

---

MASTER AUDIO: a 36-second custom cinematic score (6 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on a delicate felt piano, atmospheric pads and elegant glass textures — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a soft piano strike with a low sub-bloom (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 4, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — the poured tea arcs from the spout and, instead of falling into the cup, loops into…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, elegant glassy shimmer as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

# CONCEPT 133 — BIOLUMINESCENT DEEP-SEA CATHEDRAL

Title: Pillar 1 — Cinematic Story (a sunken cathedral on the deep-ocean floor)

Format: Micro-magic narrative hero / abyssal bioluminescent editorial (talkable)

Hero Prop: a slender glass conductor's wand tipped with a single captured bioluminescent pearl — the focal object she raises as her heartbeat pulses light through the jellyfish

Setting: a vast sunken cathedral resting on the deep-ocean floor — towering coral-crusted columns, great arched windows open to the black water, slow schools of softly glowing jellyfish drifting through the nave, faint pale shafts of distant surface light falling through the broken roof, drifting motes of bioluminescent plankton in the dark blue

Wardrobe: a flowing deep-teal gown in heavy fluid silk with a structured high collar and a weighted hem so it moves with believable underwater drift, long sleeves, fully modest and serene. Believability/realism layer (section K): every element is real and clearly described; the one magical beat is surreal yet grounded in real physics and premium execution — no cheap sparkles, no floaty/plasticky CGI; scale and 3D placement stay believable; her single self, face and wardrobe stay continuity-locked; frame joins are hard match-cuts to new angles.

Hair: long hair drifting weightless in the water, loose and slow-moving, deep natural sheen, color locked to reference

Makeup: luminous pearl glow — soft satin skin, a cool aqua-smoked lower lid, a soft pearl-rose lip with a faint sheen, a fine highlight on the high points, softly brushed brows, real pores

Movement (one impossible move): her heartbeat pulses visible light outward — each beat sends a ring of soft cyan light blooming through the surrounding jellyfish in perfect sync, the whole cathedral breathing with her pulse (locked transform keyframes)

Concept Line (1): "My heartbeat is the only light that reaches this deep." Concept Line (2): "So I'll keep it beating — for all of them."

Duration: ≈40 seconds | 8 frames

Mood: REVERENT, OCEANIC, TENDER-MONUMENTAL

Composition: centered figure in a vast cathedral nave, jellyfish blooming with light around her, surface-shafts falling behind

Grade: deep abyssal blue against soft bioluminescent cyan with faint pearl-gold surface light — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, cinematic contrast, no murk

Spoken lines (talkable): line 1 lands Frame 4; line 2 lands Frame 7 (English, natural Indian accent), close-mic and intimate as if spoken underwater into stillness

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (deep-water pressure-hush, distant whale-song, soft pulse-bloom chime, faint current-drift) plus a separate low master track — a sacred sub-bass and choral-pad bed, kept under the lines, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; wardrobe fully modest and weighted; mood reverent and oceanic, never sexualized. respected — no physical-trait enumeration.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED FOOTWEAR: pearl-white weighted ankle boots with a softly rounded toe, a coral-textured matte sole for grip on the cathedral floor, and a single abalone-shell buckle on the outer ankle catching iridescent glints, faint pearlescent sheen and ivory topstitching — identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED ACCESSORIES: a slim abalone-shell cuff on the right wrist (iridescent blue-green) + a single pearl-drop earring on the left ear that drifts a half-beat behind her head turns in the water — no other jewelry, identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as reference; locked catchlight signature is a paired reflection — a soft jellyfish-cyan glow low in the eye and a faint pearl-gold pinpoint high in the eye (the bioluminescent bloom vs the distant surface-shaft) — identical in every frame; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

---

MASTER AUDIO: a 48-second custom cinematic score (8 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on a delicate felt piano, atmospheric pads and elegant glass textures — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a soft piano strike with a low sub-bloom (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — her heartbeat pulses visible light outward, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, elegant glassy shimmer as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

## Frame 1 of 8 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

SCENE NOTE: the hush of the deep. Aira stands in the nave of a sunken cathedral on the ocean floor, the glass wand with its pearl held low at her side, slow jellyfish drifting through the arches around her, pale surface-shafts falling far behind. She is calm and reverent, her hair and gown drifting weightless in the still cold water — the establishing beat, the lonely monumental hush of the deep on her face.

VISUAL-LEAD NOTE: catch the reverent establishing beat — a lone figure in a vast sunken nave, glowing jellyfish drifting through the arches, the glass pearl-wand at her side, faint pearl-gold shafts falling behind through the dark blue.

WARDROBE: the deep-teal fluid-silk gown with the structured high collar and weighted hem, long sleeves drifting slow, the silk holding fluid underwater folds with one cool cyan sheen along the shoulder and a faint pearl rim at the collar, fully modest, pristine.

FOOTWEAR: the concept-locked pearl-white weighted ankle boots with the coral-textured sole and the abalone-shell buckle, planted firm on the cathedral floor, the pearlescent leather picking up a faint cyan thread, ivory topstitching crisp.

ACCESSORIES: the slim abalone-shell cuff on the right wrist catching an iridescent blue-green glint, and the single pearl-drop earring drifting slow at her left ear, no other jewelry.

HAIR: long hair drifting weightless and slow in the water, loose strands fanning gently, deep natural sheen, razor-clean hairline, individual strands reading real, color locked to reference.

MAKEUP: luminous pearl glow — satin skin, a cool aqua-smoked lower lid, soft pearl-rose lip with a faint sheen, fine highlight on cheekbone and nose-tip, softly brushed brows, dewy real skin with visible pores and fine vellus texture.

EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as referenced; the locked dual catchlight present — a soft jellyfish-cyan glow low in the eye, a faint pearl-gold pinpoint high in the eye — a crisp readable twin reflection; the eyes never glitch.

HANDS & NAILS: the right hand holding the glass pearl-wand low at her side with a relaxed grip, the left hand drifting soft and open in the water, fingers gently curved with no tension; short almond nails in a soft neutral gloss, natural nail-beds, neat cuticles, no fused or extra fingers.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: a calm reverent quarter-attention, brows level, lips softly closed on a slow steady breath, eyes lifted gently to the drifting jellyfish, the faintest oceanic stillness at the outer eye.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: standing three-quarter to camera in the nave, weight settled even on the planted boots with a soft 2° counter-tilt, front shoulder dropped a touch, chin level, spine long and grounded against the water's drift, alive and breathing (living stillness).

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) loose hair drifting slow in the current; (2) a school of jellyfish pulsing faint and drifting through the arches; (3) the weighted gown-hem swaying slow in the water; (4) bioluminescent plankton-motes drifting across the lower frame; (5) chest rising on a soft shallow inhale; (6) a thin cyan highlight sliding along the glass wand; (7) the silk gown breathing with a micro-shift of fold-shadow as her ribcage expands; (8) a slow eyelash settle completing a quiet blink.

MICRO-MAGIC (cue only): deep in the pearl at the wand's tip, a single faint cyan pulse has just bloomed and faded — the smallest flicker, deniable, the first whisper that her heartbeat will light the deep.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the pearl-wand and her hand at ≈20% depth, tack sharp. MIDGROUND — Aira standing in the nave. BACKGROUND — the vast cathedral arches with drifting jellyfish and faint pearl-gold surface-shafts falling through the dark blue, no clutter.

LIGHTING: KEY — the soft bioluminescent jellyfish-glow as a cool wrapping key. FILL — a faint cool ambient water-bounce lifting the shadow side. RIM — the distant pearl-gold surface-shaft skimming her crown and one shoulder. PRACTICAL — the jellyfish and the surface-shafts. SEPARATION — the nave pulled deep so she reads ≈1.5 stops up. BOUNCE — a faint cyan kick off the glass wand.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; medium-full, head-to-mid-calf, 12% headroom, the wand entering the lower third, clean deep negative space around her to receive the pulse-blooms that arrive later.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A medium-full framing holds Aira at about 12% headroom, head-to-mid-calf, the wand entering the lower third, clean deep negative space around her to receive the pulse-blooms that arrive later. She is standing three-quarter to camera in the nave, weight settled even on the planted boots with a soft 2° counter-tilt, front shoulder dropped a touch, chin level. The camera holds a mid-wide distance, Aira the sharp central figure of the Bioluminescent Deep-Sea Cathedral scene, with the scene massing around her. She faces front to the lens. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm, f/2.2; focus on her with the nave melting to soft blue bokeh; jellyfish rendering as soft glowing forms; plankton-motes as fine floating points; gentle highlight roll-off, no clipping.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: oceanic cinematic establishing hero — lone figure, vast sunken nave, one impossible cue building (BA.3 cause building to effect).

ATMOSPHERE: hushed, vast, reverent — the lonely monumental cold of a cathedral the sea has taken.

COLOR GRADE: deep abyssal blue against soft bioluminescent cyan with faint pearl-gold surface light — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, cinematic contrast, no murk.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the coral-crusted columns read rough and real; the jellyfish translucent with soft inner glow; the boot's abalone buckle catching iridescence; real skin micro-texture with soft peach-fuzz catching the cool key at the jaw; plankton drifting through the water.

STORY BEAT: the reverent hush of the deep — she stands alone in a drowned cathedral among drifting light, the pearl flickering once, the quiet before her heart lights the dark.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mismatched footwear, mannequin posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, glitching or colour-shifting eyes, hair frozen stiff in water, crushed muddy blacks, garish oversaturation, flat dull light.

# CONCEPT 134 — AURORA LOOM STATION

Title: Pillar 2 — Surreal Product Poetry (a weaving station beneath the northern lights)

Format: Micro-magic visual poem / aurora-weaving editorial (non-talkable)

Hero Prop: a tall standing wooden loom and a carved shuttle — the focal tools on which she weaves caught ribbons of aurora into a length of glowing cloth

Setting: a high open weaving platform on a frozen northern peak above the clouds — a tall wooden loom, snow-dusted timber railings, a low lantern, the vast night sky overhead alive with slow green-violet aurora ribbons, fine snow-motes drifting in the cold still air, a sea of moonlit cloud far below

Wardrobe: a heavy charcoal-and-cream felted wool wrap-coat with a high collar and a long chunky knit scarf, layered warm for the cold, the coat holding soft structured folds, fully modest. Believability/realism layer (section K): every element is real and clearly described; the one magical beat is surreal yet grounded in real physics and premium execution — no cheap sparkles, no floaty/plasticky CGI; scale and 3D placement stay believable; her single self, face and wardrobe stay continuity-locked; frame joins are hard match-cuts to new angles.

Hair: a thick side-braid over one shoulder with a few loose strands at the temple, fur-trimmed hood down, deep natural sheen, color locked to reference

Makeup: cool fresh glow — soft satin skin with frost-pink on the cheeks and nose-tip, a clean rose-balm lip, a fine highlight on the high points, softly brushed brows, real pores

Movement (one impossible move): she catches ribbons of the living aurora from the sky and weaves them on the loom into a length of glowing cloth that holds the aurora's colors and slow shimmer (locked transform keyframes), while she and the platform stay fully grounded

Concept Line: none (non-talkable) — the story carried purely by the aurora-thread, the loom, the cold light, and her absorbed craft

Duration: ≈30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: SERENE, WONDROUS, QUIETLY MASTERFUL

Composition: centered figure at a tall loom beneath a vast aurora, the glowing woven cloth as the luminous focal element

Grade: cold midnight-blue against luminous aurora green-violet with warm lantern accent — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, gentle contrast, no murk

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (high thin wind, soft loom-clack, lantern-creak, faint crystalline aurora-shimmer) plus a separate low master track — a hushed nordic drone-and-harp bed, kept low, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; wardrobe fully modest and layered; mood serene and masterful, never sexualized. respected — no physical-trait enumeration.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED FOOTWEAR: tall cream shearling-lined boots with a softly rounded toe, a charcoal lugged sole for the snow, and a single carved-bone toggle on the outer cuff, faint felted texture and cream topstitching along the seam — identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED ACCESSORIES: a thin braided-aurora bracelet on the right wrist (glowing faint green-violet, a woven thread of caught light) + a single carved-bone drop earring on the left ear that swings a half-beat behind her head turns — no other jewelry, identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as reference; locked catchlight signature is a paired reflection — a soft aurora-green glow low in the eye and a cold star-white pinpoint high in the eye (the woven aurora vs the night sky) — identical in every frame; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

---

MASTER AUDIO: a 36-second custom cinematic score (6 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on a glassy harp, an airy choir pad and soft weightless textures — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a shimmering harp sweep over a choir-pad bloom (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 4, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — she catches ribbons of the living aurora from the sky and weaves them on the loom…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, weightless choir shimmer as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

# CONCEPT 135 — COMET-TAIL POSTAL SERVICE

Title: Pillar 1 — Cinematic Story (a sky-postmaster's desk on a floating rock among the stars)

Format: Micro-magic narrative hero / celestial-mail editorial (talkable)

Hero Prop: a sealed paper letter with a wax seal and a brass postal stamp — the focal objects she ignites into small comets that fly off to deliver themselves

Setting: a tiny sky post office on a floating rock under a vast star-filled night — a worn wooden desk stacked with letters, a brass postal lantern, ink-pots and a stamp, a great open arch looking out on a galaxy-band and drifting comets, faint star-dust motes in the cool still air

Wardrobe: a deep-plum belted postal coat with brass buttons and a high collar over a cream high-neck blouse, a small leather satchel across the body, the coat holding crisp structured folds, fully modest. Believability/realism layer (section K): every element is real and clearly described; the one magical beat is surreal yet grounded in real physics and premium execution — no cheap sparkles, no floaty/plasticky CGI; scale and 3D placement stay believable; her single self, face and wardrobe stay continuity-locked; frame joins are hard match-cuts to new angles.

Hair: a neat low chignon with a few soft strands at the temple and a slim brass pen tucked behind one ear, deep natural sheen, color locked to reference

Makeup: warm glow — soft satin skin, a soft warm-bronze lid, a soft berry lip, a fine highlight on the high points, softly brushed brows, real pores

Movement (one impossible move): when she stamps a letter and breathes on it, the letter ignites into a small comet with a glowing tail and flies off into the night to deliver itself (locked transform keyframes), while she and the desk stay fully grounded

Concept Line (1): "Every letter finds its star — eventually."

Duration: ≈35 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: WARM, WHIMSICAL, QUIETLY HOPEFUL

Composition: centered figure at a postal desk before a galaxy arch, the igniting comet-letters as the luminous focal element

Grade: cool starlit indigo against warm comet-gold with brass lantern accent — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, gentle contrast, no murk

Spoken line (talkable): line lands Frame 4 (English, natural Indian accent), warm and confiding, close-mic

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (soft cosmic hush, brass stamp-thunk, lantern-hiss, comet-ignite whoosh, distant chime) plus a separate low master track — a warm celesta-and-strings bed, kept low, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; wardrobe fully modest; mood warm and whimsical, never sexualized. respected — no physical-trait enumeration.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED FOOTWEAR: oxblood leather lace-up boots with a softly rounded toe, polished brass eyelets, a star-embossed stacked heel, and slim oxblood laces, faint burnished sheen and tonal topstitching — identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED ACCESSORIES: a slim brass charm bracelet on the right wrist with a tiny envelope charm + a single brass comet-drop earring on the left ear that swings a half-beat behind her head turns — no other jewelry, identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as reference; locked catchlight signature is a paired reflection — a warm comet-gold glow low in the eye and a cold starlight-blue pinpoint high in the eye (the igniting letter vs the galaxy sky) — identical in every frame; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

---

MASTER AUDIO: a 42-second custom cinematic score (7 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on a glassy harp, an airy choir pad and soft weightless textures — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a shimmering harp sweep over a choir-pad bloom (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — when she stamps a letter and breathes on it, the letter ignites into a small comet…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, weightless choir shimmer as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

# CONCEPT 136 — CRYSTAL RESONANCE CHAMBER

Title: Pillar 2 — Surreal Product Poetry (a geode resonance chamber grown by sound)

Format: Micro-magic visual poem / crystalline-resonance editorial (non-talkable)

Hero Prop: a single clear seed-crystal cradled in her palm — the focal object from which her hum grows blooming crystal formations

Setting: a vast geode resonance chamber deep underground — walls lined with luminous quartz and amethyst clusters, a low central stone dais, soft refracted light bouncing through the facets, fine mineral dust-motes drifting in the cool still air, a faint internal glow from within the largest crystals

Wardrobe: a structured pale-quartz-grey gown with faceted sculptural draping and a high neck, a fine crystalline-beaded shawl across the shoulders, the gown holding crisp angular folds, fully modest. Believability/realism layer (section K): every element is real and clearly described; the one magical beat is surreal yet grounded in real physics and premium execution — no cheap sparkles, no floaty/plasticky CGI; scale and 3D placement stay believable; her single self, face and wardrobe stay continuity-locked; frame joins are hard match-cuts to new angles.

Hair: a sleek centre-part low knot with a few soft strands at the temple, deep natural sheen, color locked to reference

Makeup: cool luminous glow — soft satin skin, a frosted silver-lilac lid, a soft mauve lip, a fine crystalline highlight on the high points, softly brushed brows, real pores

Movement (one impossible move): her sustained hum grows crystals in real time — from the seed in her palm and outward across the chamber walls, blooming geometric crystal formations that rise and branch in time with her tone (locked transform keyframes), while she and the dais stay fully grounded

Concept Line: none (non-talkable; she hums a wordless sustained tone with closed lips) — the story carried purely by the growing crystal, the refracted light, and her absorbed resonance

Duration: ≈30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: SERENE, MINERAL, QUIETLY POWERFUL

Composition: centered figure on a stone dais in a glowing geode, the blooming crystal formations as the luminous focal element

Grade: cool cavern-violet against prismatic crystal-white with faint warm core-glow — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, gentle contrast, no murk

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (deep cavern resonance, soft crystalline chime-bloom, faint harmonic ring, her wordless hum) plus a separate low master track — a glassy resonance-bowl-and-pad bed, kept low, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; wardrobe fully modest; mood serene and powerful, never sexualized. respected — no physical-trait enumeration.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED FOOTWEAR: pale-grey suede heeled ankle boots with a softly pointed toe, a faceted clear-crystal block heel that catches prismatic light, a slim silver side-zip, and tonal topstitching — identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED ACCESSORIES: a raw-crystal cuff on the right wrist (a cluster of clear quartz points) + a single faceted quartz-drop earring on the left ear that swings a half-beat behind her head turns — no other jewelry, identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as reference; locked catchlight signature is a paired reflection — a prismatic crystal-white sparkle low in the eye and a soft amethyst pinpoint high in the eye (the growing crystal vs the cavern glow) — identical in every frame; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

---

MASTER AUDIO: a 36-second custom cinematic score (6 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on a delicate felt piano, atmospheric pads and elegant glass textures — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a soft piano strike with a low sub-bloom (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 4, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — her sustained hum grows crystals in real time, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, elegant glassy shimmer as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

# CONCEPT 137 — FLOATING LANTERN SKY-MARKET

Title: Pillar 1 — Cinematic Story (a sky-market of floating stalls and drifting lanterns at dusk)

Format: Micro-magic narrative hero / twilight sky-market editorial (talkable)

Hero Prop: a single paper sky-lantern cradled in her hands — the focal object she whispers a wish into and releases, its words drifting out as glowing golden script

Setting: a floating sky-market at dusk — small market stalls suspended on little floating platforms among drifting paper lanterns, a railed wooden walkway underfoot, warm twilight clouds glowing below, the first stars pricking the deepening blue above, soft warm haze in the gentle air

Wardrobe: a warm marigold-and-saffron wrap coat with a tied sash over a cream high-neck tunic, the coat holding crisp structured folds, fully modest. Believability/realism layer (section K): every element is real and clearly described; the one magical beat is surreal yet grounded in real physics and premium execution — no cheap sparkles, no floaty/plasticky CGI; scale and 3D placement stay believable; her single self, face and wardrobe stay continuity-locked; frame joins are hard match-cuts to new angles.

Hair: a soft braided crown with a few loose strands at the temple, deep natural sheen, color locked to reference

Makeup: warm sunset glow — soft satin skin, a warm amber lid, a soft coral lip, a fine highlight on the high points, softly brushed brows, real pores

Movement (one impossible move): when she whispers a wish into the lantern and releases it, it lights itself and rises, and the words of the wish drift out of it as glowing golden script that gathers into a small constellation overhead (locked transform keyframes), while she and the walkway stay fully grounded

Concept Line (1): "Every wish just needs a light to carry it."

Duration: ≈30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: WARM, WISTFUL, GENTLY HOPEFUL

Composition: centered figure at a market railing among floating lanterns, the self-lighting lantern and its golden wish-script as the luminous focal element

Grade: deep twilight-blue against warm lantern-amber with saffron accent — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, gentle contrast, no murk

Spoken line (talkable): line lands Frame 4 (English, natural Indian accent), warm and confiding, close-mic

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (soft sky-market murmur, paper-lantern crackle, gentle breeze, a faint chime as wish-script forms) plus a separate low master track — a warm sitar-and-strings bed, kept low, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; wardrobe fully modest; mood warm and wistful, never sexualized. respected — no physical-trait enumeration.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED FOOTWEAR: tan leather buckled ankle boots with a softly rounded toe, a wooden block heel, a single brass side-buckle, and tonal topstitching, faint burnished sheen — identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED ACCESSORIES: a stack of carved-wood bangles on the right wrist + a single brass lantern-charm earring on the left ear that swings a half-beat behind her head turns — no other jewelry, identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as reference; locked catchlight signature is a paired reflection — a warm lantern-amber glow low in the eye and a soft twilight-rose pinpoint high in the eye (the lantern vs the dusk sky) — identical in every frame; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

---

MASTER AUDIO: a 36-second custom cinematic score (6 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on a glassy harp, an airy choir pad and soft weightless textures — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a shimmering harp sweep over a choir-pad bloom (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 4, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — when she whispers a wish into the lantern and releases it, it lights itself and rises,…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, weightless choir shimmer as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

# CONCEPT 138 — SOLAR-SAIL ATELIER

Title: Pillar 2 — Surreal Product Poetry (a sailmaker's atelier aboard a solar-sailing skyship)

Format: Micro-magic visual poem / woven-light craft editorial (non-talkable)

Hero Prop: a slim bronze spindle threaded with woven light — the focal object from which she draws threads of captured sunlight and weaves shimmering solar-sail cloth

Setting: an atelier aboard a solar-sailing skyship — great gossamer solar sails billowing against a deep starfield through tall open bays, bolts of luminous fabric stacked along the walls, a long wooden weaving table and a tall loom, the distant sun a small warm disc, fine gold motes drifting in the still air

Wardrobe: a structured bronze-gold tailored coat-dress with a high collar and an artisan's apron-sash at the waist, the coat holding crisp tailored folds, fully modest. Believability/realism layer (section K): every element is real and clearly described; the one magical beat is surreal yet grounded in real physics and premium execution — no cheap sparkles, no floaty/plasticky CGI; scale and 3D placement stay believable; her single self, face and wardrobe stay continuity-locked; frame joins are hard match-cuts to new angles.

Hair: a sleek high twist with a few soft strands at the temple, deep natural sheen, color locked to reference

Makeup: warm metallic glow — soft satin skin, a warm bronze-gold lid, a soft terracotta lip, a fine gold highlight on the high points, softly brushed brows, real pores

Movement (one impossible move): she draws threads of captured sunlight from the spindle and weaves them into shimmering solar-sail cloth in real time — the fabric forming and billowing into shape between her hands, catching light as it grows (locked transform keyframes), while she and the table stay fully grounded

Concept Line: none (non-talkable) — the story carried purely by the woven light, the billowing sails, and her absorbed craft

Duration: ≈35 seconds | 7 frames

Mood: WARM, INDUSTRIOUS, QUIETLY MAJESTIC

Composition: centered figure at a weaving table before billowing solar sails, the forming light-cloth as the luminous focal element

Grade: deep starfield-indigo against warm solar-gold with bronze accent — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, gentle contrast, no murk

Audio note: per-frame diegetic (soft skyship hum, gentle sail-billow flutter, fine loom-click, a faint harmonic shimmer as light is woven) plus a separate low master track — a warm cello-and-harp bed, kept low, never full.

Identity safety: AIRA is an adult; wardrobe fully modest; mood warm and majestic, never sexualized. respected — no physical-trait enumeration.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED FOOTWEAR: bronze-brown leather buckled work-boots with a softly rounded toe, a copper-toned sole, two slim brass buckles at the ankle, and tonal topstitching, faint burnished sheen — identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED ACCESSORIES: a copper spool-bangle on the right wrist + a single slim bronze needle-drop earring on the left ear that swings a half-beat behind her head turns — no other jewelry, identical in every frame.

— CONCEPT-LOCKED EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as reference; locked catchlight signature is a paired reflection — a warm solar-gold glow low in the eye and a cool starfield-blue pinpoint high in the eye (the woven light vs the starfield) — identical in every frame; the iris is never repainted and the eyes never glitch.

---

MASTER AUDIO: a 42-second custom cinematic score (7 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on a deep warm sub, an elegant felt piano and sleek modern textures — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a single elegant piano strike haloed by a low sub-bloom (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — she draws threads of captured sunlight from the spindle and weaves them into shimmering solar-sail cloth…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, glassy modern shimmer as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

## Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

SCENE NOTE: the hush before the weave. Aira stands at a long weaving table in the solar-sail atelier, a bronze spindle threaded with woven light resting in her hands, great gossamer sails billowing slow against the starfield through the open bays behind her. She is calm and absorbed, about to draw the first thread — the establishing beat, the quiet industrious wonder of a sailmaker among the stars in her face.

VISUAL-LEAD NOTE: catch the warm establishing beat — a figure at a weaving table holding a spindle of woven light, billowing solar sails against a starfield behind, bolts of luminous fabric along the walls, the distant sun a small warm disc.

WARDROBE: the bronze-gold tailored coat-dress with the high collar and apron-sash, the coat holding crisp tailored folds with one warm solar sheen along the shoulder and a cool starfield rim down the other arm, fully modest, pristine.

FOOTWEAR: the concept-locked bronze-brown buckled work-boots with the copper sole and brass buckles, planted firm on the atelier floor, the leather catching warm solar light, buckles glinting.

ACCESSORIES: the copper spool-bangle on the right wrist catching a warm glint, and the bronze needle-drop earring hanging still at her left ear, no other jewelry.

HAIR: the sleek high twist with a few soft strands at the temple, deep natural sheen, razor-clean hairline, individual strands reading real, color locked to reference.

MAKEUP: warm metallic glow — satin skin, a warm bronze-gold lid, soft terracotta lip, fine gold highlight on cheekbone and nose-tip, softly brushed brows, dewy real skin with visible pores and fine vellus texture.

EYE COLOUR: iris exactly as referenced; the locked dual catchlight present — a warm solar-gold glow low in the eye, a cool starfield-blue pinpoint high in the eye — a crisp readable twin reflection; the eyes never glitch.

HANDS & NAILS: both hands holding the spindle of woven light at the table, fingers gently curved with no tension; short almond nails in a soft neutral gloss, natural nail-beds, neat cuticles, no fused or extra fingers.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: a calm industrious quarter-attention, brows level, lips softly closed, eyes lowered to the spindle with absorbed focus, the faintest contented stillness at the outer eye.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: standing three-quarter to camera at the table, spine long and easy, weight settled even with a soft 2° lean toward the spindle, front shoulder dropped a touch, chin level, alive and breathing (living stillness).

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) a soft strand drifting slow at the temple; (2) the great sails billowing almost imperceptibly behind through the bays; (3) the distant sun's warm disc shimmering faint; (4) fine gold motes drifting across the lower frame; (5) chest rising on a soft shallow inhale; (6) a thin warm highlight sliding along the woven-light spindle; (7) the coat breathing with a micro-shift of fold-shadow as her ribcage expands; (8) a slow eyelash settle completing a quiet blink.

MICRO-MAGIC (cue only): along the spindle a single thread of light has brightened and dimmed, as if the captured sunlight were stirring — deniable, the first whisper that she will weave it into cloth.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the spindle of woven light in her hands at ≈20% depth, tack sharp. MIDGROUND — Aira at the table. BACKGROUND — the billowing solar sails against the starfield, bolts of fabric along the walls, the distant sun, no clutter.

LIGHTING: KEY — the warm solar disc as a soft wrapping key from frame-left. FILL — a gentle cool starfield bounce lifting the shadow side. RIM — cool starlight skimming her crown and one shoulder. PRACTICAL — the sun and the glowing fabric bolts. SEPARATION — the bays pulled deep so she reads ≈1.5 stops up. BOUNCE — a faint gold kick off the spindle.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; medium, chest-up to the table, 12% headroom, the spindle entering the lower third, clean negative space above to receive the woven cloth that arrives later.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A medium framing holds Aira at about 12% headroom, chest-up to the table, the spindle entering the lower third, clean negative space above to receive the woven cloth that arrives later. She is standing three-quarter to camera at the table, spine long and easy, weight settled even with a soft 2° lean toward the spindle, front shoulder dropped a touch, chin level, alive and breathing. The camera holds a mid distance, Aira the sharp central figure of the Solar-Sail Atelier scene, with the glow arcing the upper frame above her. She faces front to the lens. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm, f/2.2; focus split between her lowered near eye and the spindle so both read crisp; the sails melting to soft gold-and-indigo bokeh; motes as fine floating points; gentle highlight roll-off, no clipping.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: warm cinematic establishing hero — sailmaker at the loom, one impossible cue building (BA.3 cause building to effect).

ATMOSPHERE: warm, hushed, industrious — the quiet of an atelier sailing among the stars.

COLOR GRADE: deep starfield-indigo against warm solar-gold with bronze accent — rich uncrushed blacks, clean whites, full mid-tone, gentle contrast, no murk.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the spindle reads brass and real; the woven light fine and luminous; the fabric bolts shimmering with a real weave; the boot leather and copper sole burnished; real skin micro-texture with soft peach-fuzz catching the warm key at the jaw; motes drifting fine.

STORY BEAT: the industrious hush — she stands at her loom among billowing sails, a spindle of light in her hands, a thread stirring, the quiet before she weaves.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mismatched footwear, mannequin posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, glitching or colour-shifting eyes, crushed muddy blacks, garish oversaturation, flat dull light.
